name: Lining Black
description: The darkest, most consistent lining black on the market. Smooth flow, clean lines every time. EU REACH compliant and gamma-sterilized for maximum safety.
ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, CI 77266 (Black 2), Hamamelis Virginiana Water, Isopropyl Alcohol

name: Bitchin' Black
description: A rich, deep black designed for bold lining and solid packing. EU REACH Compliant, vegan, and sterilized. Quantum Tattoo Ink's Bitchin Black is a deep, rich black.
ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, CI 77266, Isopropyl Alcohol, Hamamelis Virginiana Water

name: True Black
description: Pure pigment, zero compromise. True Black delivers unparalleled depth and heals jet black every time. A staple for any serious artist.

name: Light Gray Wash
description: Perfect for subtle shading and watercolor-style work. Heals smooth with no patchiness. The lightest of our gray wash range.

name: Medium Gray Wash
description: The go-to mid-tone for any gray wash or black-and-grey piece. Consistent, smooth, and perfectly formulated.

name: Dark Gray Wash
description: Deep, rich gray for bold shadows and contrast work. Bridges the gap between medium gray and solid black.

name: Nuclear Green
description: A vivid, electric green that packs a punch. EU REACH compliant. Perfect for color realism and neo-traditional work.

name: Forest Green
description: Deep, lush green perfect for botanical tattoos and nature-inspired work. Rich pigment that heals true.

name: Crimson Red
description: Bold, saturated red with excellent color retention. EU REACH compliant. The definitive red for traditional and neo-traditional styles.

name: Scarlet Red
description: A bright, fire-engine red that stays vibrant. Perfect for roses, flames, and bold color work.

name: Royal Blue
description: Rich, deep blue with incredible saturation. Heals true and bright. A must-have for color realism and portraiture.

name: Electric Blue
description: Vivid electric blue for watercolor effects and color realism. Bright, consistent, and EU REACH compliant.

name: Violet Purple
description: Deep, rich violet that heals beautifully. Perfect for shading purple tones in realistic and neo-traditional work.

name: Sunburst Yellow
description: Bright, warm yellow with excellent opacity. Perfect for highlights and bold color work. Heals vibrant and true.

name: Tiger Orange
description: Bold, fiery orange with exceptional pigment load. Ideal for traditional Japanese and neo-traditional styles.

name: Flamingo Pink
description: Soft, feminine pink with a warm undertone. Perfect for floral work and color realism. Heals smooth and consistent.

name: Titanium White
description: Pure, bright white for highlights, linework, and mixing. High-opacity formula that heals opaque.

name: Gray Wash Set (4 Bottles)
description: The complete gray wash solution. Light, Medium, Dark, and Lining Black in one set. Perfect for artists who want to master black and grey.

name: Starter Color Set (8 Bottles)
description: Everything a color artist needs to get started with Quantum. 8 essential colors hand-picked by our artist team. Includes carry case.

name: Master Collection (12 Bottles)
description: The full professional arsenal. 12 hand-selected inks covering the complete spectrum. For the artist who accepts no compromise.

name: Aftercare Balm
description: Nourishing aftercare balm formulated specifically for fresh tattoos. Accelerates healing and preserves color vibrancy. Vegan and fragrance-free.
ingredients: Shea Butter, Aloe Vera, Vitamin E, Jojoba Oil

name: Healing Lotion
description: Lightweight, fast-absorbing lotion for the healing phase. Keeps tattoos moisturized and prevents scabbing. Dermatologist tested.
ingredients: Aqua, Aloe Barbadensis Gel, Glycerin, Allantoin

name: Holy Water Mixing Solution
description: The industry-standard mixing solution. Use Holy Water to thin inks, create custom washes, and achieve the perfect consistency for any technique.

name: Aqua Blue
description: A cool, clear aqua blue perfect for ocean-inspired work and soft watercolor effects. Heals smooth and vibrant.

name: Lavender Mist
description: Soft, delicate lavender for floral work and soft color realism. A crowd favorite for its gentle, healed look.
